title: The Boys
description: This mod allows you to become one of the characters from the Boys universe, like Homelander, Train A or Transparent.
body:
### Become a Supe from The Boys
Become one of the iconic characters from The Boys—Homelander, A‑Train, or Translucent—and wield unique items and abilities in Minecraft.

### Development status
This mod is in early development. Content is limited for now, and community ideas are highly appreciated—share your suggestions!

### Community
- Join the Discord to discuss features and give feedback: https://discord.gg/7wfMzDQ

### Info

| Social | Link |
|:--|:--|
| Discord | [![discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865f2?logo=discord&style=flat&logoColor=white&color=black)](https://discord.gg/7wfMzDQ) |
| Patreon | [![patreon](https://img.shields.io/badge/Patreon-F96854?logo=patreon&style=flat&logoColor=white&color=black)](https://www.patreon.com/chappiepie) |
| Twitter/X | [![X (twitter)](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow-%40chappiepie07?logo=x&style=flat&logoColor=white&color=black)](https://x.com/chappiepie07) |

### Features
- Ability synthesizer to craft supe powers inspired by The Boys characters.
- A growing set of early-game items designed to expand over time.
- Creative-only suit items that can be equipped by right-clicking armor with a suit piece.


![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fcca57cd391315e8793542bc1feefbb15828137.png)

### How abilities work

- Craft the synthesizer; it’s the workstation for creating superpowers.
- Use the recipes below to prepare the needed components.
- Insert the items into the synthesizer, then apply the resulting vials to your character.

![crafts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da9364eeb1cd32982369e9574434ee9cc07ca48.png)

![Vials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9699fcfb1e2b66ac91ce74db3a244ddb238e2118.png)

![how to use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/717d768f15d24602e037f9843d0cd7fac1d697cf.png)

 ![how to use 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fffc02cf10a125f98d5b55bfc2641d9d5c85aca.png)

### Suits

Crafting for suits is not finished yet. For now, in Creative Mode you can equip suits by right‑clicking armor with the corresponding suit piece.

![suit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/789ad3dc1a0478b2d6d484a8b9a37bab3f2ab9c0.png)

### Laser eyes alignment
If your skin has non‑standard eye positions, follow this guide to align laser eyes correctly.

![change lasers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a5460259a6f42ab2e68b5b461f3c78f173fc982.png)
